general_rule: Keep one coherent bubble and lettering system across all panels. Bubbles must look generated as part of the illustrated manhwa panel, not UI overlays.

reference_toolkit.rule: This toolkit is a bubble-only context asset. Use it only for bubble/caption shape, fill, border, tail, thought-dot, glow, spacing, and lettering mood. It must not contain characters or scenes.

reference_images.purpose: Canonical bubble-only visual reference for generated chapter panels.
reference_images.prompt_addendum: Create a clean bubble-only manhwa lettering style sheet for THE ECLIPSE CROWN. No characters, no faces, no bodies, no hands, no costumes, no weapons, no background scene. Show reusable empty samples only: black gothic narration card with thin ivory/silver ornamental filigree border; warm ivory normal dialogue speech bubble with clean black ink outline and natural tail; warm ivory supernatural thought bubble with thin black-silver decorative ring, moonlit glow, and thought-dot chain; small engraved gothic background caption plaque. Keep the design close to the accepted chapter-1 style: elegant, readable, premium Korean manhwa, integrated artwork feel, not UI. Use blank interiors or tiny non-readable placeholder strokes only, no readable words, no labels, no logos, no watermarks.

narration_caption.border: thin ivory or silver ornamental filigree border
narration_caption.font: elegant white serif lettering, cinematic and readable
narration_caption.placement: atmospheric negative space, never covering a main face

normal_dialogue.shape: clean white or warm ivory manhwa speech bubble
normal_dialogue.border: inked black or dark charcoal outline with subtle paper texture
normal_dialogue.font: readable dark serif lettering with graceful line breaks
normal_dialogue.tail: natural tail pointing clearly to the visible speaker

supernatural_thought.shape: warm ivory oval or circular thought bubble
supernatural_thought.border: thin black-silver decorative ring with moonlit glow
supernatural_thought.font: dark elegant serif lettering, slightly mystical but highly readable
supernatural_thought.tail: small thought-dot chain or glow pointing to the magical source, relic, reflection, or receiving character

background_text.rule: Use only short exact place/time/context captions when they clarify the scene.
background_text.style: small gothic engraved plaque, ritual title card, or atmospheric serif caption integrated into the environment
background_text.avoid: random decorative words, fake letters, logos, watermarks, or long exposition
